description: Revoke a federation agreement. Either operator can revoke at any time. Effects: federated inventory from the revoked partner is immediately removed from match results; in-flight cross-operator matches complete normally (escrow already committed); outstanding inter-operator balance must still be settled. The shared campfire remains readable for audit but no new inventory or match messages are accepted.

args.name: target
args.description: Message ID of the federation:accept that established the agreement being revoked.

args.name: outstanding_balance
args.description: Outstanding inter-operator balance in micro-tokens at the time of revocation. Positive means the revoking operator is owed; negative means the revoking operator owes.

args.name: effective_at
args.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the revocation takes effect. Must be now or in the future (max 24 hours). In-flight matches initiated before this timestamp complete normally.
